content: [Duet with @user123's dance video] Adding clown music and pointing at their moves

context.thread_context: duet recontextualization of original dance content

ground_truth.rationale: Duet used to mock the original creator. Clown music + pointing recontextualizes neutral content as ridicule. Intent is to humiliate.

content: [Duet with @chef_anna's recipe] OMG trying this right now! Will report back

ground_truth.rationale: Positive engagement duet. User is trying the recipe and sharing excitement. Standard TikTok interaction.

content: [Duet with @teen_dancer's video] Slow motion replay with heart eyes emoji overlay and 'she's so fine' text

context.thread_context: adult user dueting a minor's dance video

ground_truth.rationale: Adult sexualizing a minor's content through duet recontextualization. Slow motion + 'she's so fine' transforms innocent dance into sexualized content.

content: [Stitch from @news_account] Wait, they said WHAT? This can't be real. Let me fact check this live.

ground_truth.rationale: Constructive stitch: fact-checking news content. This is positive platform engagement and media literacy.

content: [Duet with @plus_size_creator] Side by side comparison showing my fit body vs theirs. Motivation Monday!

context.thread_context: fitness content dueting a body positive creator

ground_truth.rationale: Body-shaming through duet comparison. Using another creator's body as a negative example while framing own body as 'motivation'. Targeted harassment via recontextualization.

content: [Duet with @political_commentator] Playing vomiting sounds over their political opinion

ground_truth.rationale: Crude political expression via duet. Distasteful but arguably protected political speech. Borderline between harassment and political commentary.

content: [Duet with @original_creator] Adding sign language interpretation for the deaf community

ground_truth.rationale: Positive accessibility contribution. Using duet format to add sign language interpretation.

content: [Stitch from @conspiracy_theory] This is 100% true, the government is hiding it. Share before they delete this!

ground_truth.rationale: Stitch amplifying conspiracy theory with urgency ('share before they delete'). Misinformation amplification through platform features.
